title: イナリ様に任せときな！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On one of my days off, I'm going around town gathering books and
other resources to use in Inari One's training, when...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss, fancy seein' you here! Wazzup? Doin' some shoppin'?
choice_data_list: Something like that. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss, fancy seein' you here! Wazzup? Doin' some shoppin'?
choice_data_list: Something like that. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya see, my old teammates are comin' for a visit soon, so I'm lookin' for
spots to take 'em. Gotta make their trip worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But man, talk about options! Every place I go is just as stylin' as the
last!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...That's it! You've got a good eye for stuff, right? You got any fav
spots? Mind takin' me to see 'em?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...That's it! You've got a good eye for stuff, right? You got any fav
spots? Mind takin' me to see 'em?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, thanks a million! I knew I could count on you, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, thanks a million! I knew I could count on you, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The hell's with this fancy parfait?! There's even flowers on it... Ohhh,
is this what they call "aesthetic"?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oho! Everyone's walkin' around in their bathing suits! And someone
over there is dancin'... It's just like a festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a pool hall, huh? I've watched a few games before, so let's see if
I can win in one shot!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this place is pretty stylish too.
...Oh, whazzat over there?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Be right back, I'm gonna go check this out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Always careful to let me know where she's going, Inari One heads
further into the store. She's so considerate of others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her Oi teammates coming to town, perhaps this will be a chance
for her to let her hair down and relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Inari One takes a look around, I decide to browse the shop
myself...

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text:
I told you, it was broken when I got home! Can't you just let me
exchange it?

text_block_list.name: Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
But sir, it wasn't broken when we wrapped it up for you to take home.
Um... is it possible you bumped it on the way back?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when I happen upon a very heated discussion at the shop
register. The customer looks like he wants to grab the poor employee
by the throat...
choice_data_list:
(Inari's still on the other side of the store,
right?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As much as I want to help the employee, I need to make sure she
won't get caught up in any... altercations. But seeing as she's out of
sight, I decide to come to his aid.
choice_data_list: Hey, um, why don't we all just calm down...

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! The hell are you?! Mind your own business and scram! Or
maybe... you wanna take this schmuck's place and—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa-ho there, big guy! Gotta say, I like your spunk! Ya look like
you're ready to trade punches!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as the man turns his anger on me, a tiny figure enters the scene.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you got some complaints. But ya know what they say...
Actions speak louder than words! C'mon, I say you settle this the
old-fashioned way!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And the loser can't go cryin' home to Mommy, got it? Now, whatcha
thinkin'? A foot race? Or maybe—

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text: W-wait, are you suggesting we fight?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What, ya worried or somethin'? Don't sweat it, I'll be your ref! I'll
make sure you settle this fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm not looking for a fight. I just—ah, urgh... Guess I did lose my
temper there...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Izzat so? Guess I'll have to wait to ref a street brawl! Sorry for
misunderstandin'. You'll forgive me, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The customer looks stunned as Inari One flashes a grin his way. He
takes a deep breath before continuing... It looks like he's finally
calmed down.

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text:
...Um, my bad. I bought this as a gift for my girlfriend, you see. Seeing
it all busted up just set me off.

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text: I owe you all an apology... Sorry. And, miss... thanks for stopping me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wow, Boss, puttin' yourself in the middle of that spat sure took guts!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wow, Boss, puttin' yourself in the middle of that spat sure took guts!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya coulda just ignored 'em, but ya did the right thing!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aw, c'mon, you're embarrassin' me! Hehe, not that I mind hearin' that
from you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If Inari One hadn't stepped in, things might have gotten ugly fast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, the man calmed down, but when I think about what could
have happened if things had taken a wrong turn...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's up? Why're you starin' like that? There something on my
face?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who got us into trouble this time, but I do want to avoid
putting her in danger as much as possible.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I was wondering why you looked so serious...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But you're talkin' to THE Inari One! And that should be my line!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're too nice, ya know that, Boss? I get wantin' to help, but ya
didn't have to do it alone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're too nice, ya know that, Boss? I get wantin' to help, but ya
didn't have to do it alone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're thinkin' 'bout what woulda happened if that guy tried fightin'
me, right? Well, my chances in a fight are a lot better than yours.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm an Umamusume, ya know! I woulda knocked that punk into
next week!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
When you were lost, you had me help you out, right? And today, you
helped me out by showin' me around.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm only sayin' this one more time, so listen up—You don't gotta do
stuff alone!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If ya can, why not ask an expert for their assistance? There's a right
tool for every job, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Boss, ya don't gotta be so serious...
Ah, looks like the sun's callin' it a day. We should do the same!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Boss, ya don't gotta be so serious...
Ah, looks like the sun's callin' it a day. We should do the same!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I get that you're as earnest as they come, Boss. Trust me, I know
better than anyone.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I get that you're as earnest as they come, Boss. Trust me, I know
better than anyone.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(But wow, that attitude sure did get you in trouble today! Hehe, I
better keep my eye on you, or else!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya know, I think I'll tell the Oi girls about today! Let 'em know ya
gave me a personal tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inari One smiles as she gives me a few more pats on the back.
